title: UK REACH authorisation for SEA (Legacy Parts Consortium), 20 January 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide  Authorised use  The use of chromium trioxide to electroplate legacy components, such as for classic or vintage cars and motorcycles, to create a coating to match the original specification and provide specific performance characteristics.  Holders of the authorisation and authorisation numbers  Surface Engineering Association, Legacy Parts Consortium:   Agbrigg Chrome Platers (UKREACH/25/01/00) Alpha Electroplaters Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/01) Castle Polishing & Chrome Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/02) Derby Plating Services Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/03) Doug Taylor Metal Finishing Co. (UKREACH/25/01/04) Essex Finishers Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/05) Genius of the Lamp Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/06) Hockley Enterprises (Essex) Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/07) Marque Restore Chrome Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/08) Merridale Polishing & Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/09) Prestige Electro Plating (UKREACH/25/01/10) Quality Chrome Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/11) S & T Electro-plate (UKREACH/25/01/12) Vintage Headlamp Restoration Ltd (UKREACH/25/01/13)   Date of decision  20 January 2025 "
